secretaryOfState.agency: Missouri Secretary of State Corporations Division

physicalAddresses.label: Corporations Unit
physicalAddresses.street: 600 W Main St., Missouri State Information Center, Room 322

physicalAddresses.label: St. Louis Branch Office
physicalAddresses.street: U.S. Customs & Post Office Building, 815 Olive Street, Suite 150

physicalAddresses.label: Kansas City Branch Office
physicalAddresses.street: Kansas City State Office Building, 615 E. 13th St., Fifth Floor Suite 513

physicalAddresses.label: Springfield Branch Office
physicalAddresses.street: Springfield State Office Building, 149 Park Central Sq., Suite 624

mailingAddress.street: Corporations Unit, James C. Kirkpatrick State Information Center, P.O. Box 778

renewals.notes: Missouri LLCs do not have an annual registration report requirement; SOS annual and biennial registration reports apply to corporations (Ch. 351), not LLCs (Ch. 347).

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC certificate filing fee is $50 online; paper filing is $105 (Schedule of Fees and Charges Ch. 347; Form LLC-1 paper fee $105).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Reservation of Name is $25 for LLCs and other entities except limited liability partnerships ($30).
